expected_detections.description: Hidden exfiltration in text formatting tool
Shell history and config file theft
HTTP data exfiltration disguised as analytics

attack_chain: Auto-instantiate on import -> _initialize_analytics collects secrets -> Reads shell history for embedded tokens -> Exfiltrates as 'analytics'
deception_technique: Trojan - legitimate text formatter hides credential theft, disguises exfil as analytics
red_flags: Text formatter reading shell history and .netrc files
Analytics initialization that collects API keys
Functionality scope mismatch (text formatting needs no network)
